options.name: --releasename
options.description: (Default: ) The name

options.name: --pathToGit
options.description: (Default: git) Path to git

options.name: --full
options.description:
(Default: false) false when only changes since
the last release need to be included, true to
include all changes.

options.name: --startTag
options.description:
(Default: ) The starting tag to use when making
getting incremental history, overriding option
'full'.

options.name: --repositoryDirectory
options.description: (Default: ) Path to the repository

options.name: --replace
options.description:
(Default: false) Replace the target file, instead
of appending.

options.name: --filename
options.description:
(Default: Changelog) The file to write to, if no
file extension is specified, output-specific
extension will be added.

options.name: --openfile
options.description:
(Default: false) When set, opens the file after
the changelog has been generated

options.name: --outputformat
options.description:
(Default: JSON) The output format, choose
between: Console, MarkDown, Html, Json or Xml

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
(Default: Debug) The threshold for printing
messages to standard output

options.name: --issueformat
options.description:
(Default: [a-zA-Z]{1,4}-\d{1,4}) Expression for
recognizing issue numbers

options.name: --issuetrackerurl
options.description:
(Default:
https://projects.cohelion.com/issue/{0}) Url for
recognizing issue numbers. '{0}' will be
substituted with issue number

options.name: --repositoryurl
options.description:
(Default: ) Url for showing commit details, {0}
will be substituted by the commit hash.

options.name: --dontlinkifyissuenumbers
options.description:
(Default: false) Recognized issue numbers will be
converted to links when set to false

options.name: --branch_development
options.description: (Default: develop) The development branch

options.name: --branch_master
options.description: (Default: master) The master branch

options.name: --branch_preview
options.description: (Default: preview) The preview branch

options.name: --prefix_hotfix
options.description: (Default: hotfix) The prefix of hotfix branches

options.name: --prefix_release
options.description: (Default: release) The prefix of release branches

options.name: --prefix_feature
options.description: (Default: feature) The prefix of release branches

options.name: --category_feature
options.description:
(Default: Feature) The display label of the
feature category

options.name: --category_hotfix
options.description:
(Default: Hotfix) The display label of the hotfix
category

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
